phases.label: Foundation
phases.summary: Defined the type system (33+ interfaces). Built the state mutation engine. Created first world file. First full playthrough with consistent NPC behavior — all in one day.
phases.keyLearning: The type system IS the game design document. Every mechanic is a typed interface.

phases.label: Pipeline Revolution
phases.summary: Moved from single AI call to multi-step pipeline. Separated simulation, direction, and narration. Swapped AI providers mid-day with zero game logic changes. The provider-agnostic bet paid off immediately.
phases.keyLearning: Specialized models at each step produce better results at lower total cost than one powerful model.
phases.pivotNote: Architectural pivot point. Tripled AI costs per turn but dramatically improved output quality.

phases.label: Reliability
phases.summary: Hardened the pipeline. Built 5-stage response parser. Added coherence validation. Killed token-by-token streaming after it silently hung. Jumped from 1 world to 6.
phases.keyLearning: Kill features that work 90% of the time. 90% reliable is a broken product.

phases.label: Systems Integration
phases.summary: Shipped all 12 game overlays: battle, cards, romance, interrogation, infiltration, negotiation, shop, crafting, evidence board, rivalry, temptation, duel of wits. Progressive web app support.
phases.keyLearning: Depth > breadth. One world with rich systems beats ten shallow ones.

phases.label: Living World
phases.summary: NPC autonomous behavior. World events firing independently. Living location system. First playtester said: 'The world feels alive even when I'm not doing anything.'
phases.keyLearning: Autonomous NPC behavior was the single biggest 'wow' moment in playtesting.

phases.label: Polish Sprint
phases.milestone: v0.11 — 'Doesn't feel like a chatbot anymore.'
phases.summary: Highest-volume day: 33 commits. 20+ message types. Adaptive overlays. 8 visual themes. Director personas. Skill discovery cards. Inline game HUDs. 10 worlds. External critique cycle.
phases.keyLearning: UX is 50% of the product. Same AI output, presented differently, feels completely different.

phases.label: Auth & Scale
phases.summary: Authentication system. Multi-user support. Achievement system. LLM observability. World builder with AI-assisted generation. 5-layer coherence system finalized.
phases.keyLearning: Coherence is the moat. Requires layers of validation, not a single technique.

phases.label: Ship It
phases.summary: Final hardening. Edge case fixes. Deployment. 125 commits across 8 days. Shipping is a decision, not a state.
phases.keyLearning: The product isn't the code. The product is what happens when someone else uses it.
